name: goodjob
description: Internal recognition & rewards – root scripts for frontend + backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -C frontend dev" "pnpm -C backend start:dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C frontend build && pnpm -C backend build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C frontend lint && pnpm -C backend lint
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm -C frontend install && pnpm -C backend install
